name: pyagentt
description: AgentPyT - Token Scanner with CLI, MCP, and local React web dashboard

scripts.dev:backend: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const p = spawn('.venv/Scripts/python.exe', ['-m', 'uvicorn', 'pyagentt_cli.web_api:app', '--host', '127.0.0.1', '--port', '8765', '--reload'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); p.on('close', c => process.exit(c));"
